# CourseWise

> CourseWise is a FERPA-first teaching platform that unifies course modules, materials, quizzes, attendance, discussions, messaging, and AI-assisted authoring for teachers, students, and admins under a single shared data model.

CourseWise is a web application for schools. Teachers, students, and admins each get a role-tailored view over one course data model. Core capabilities include course and module organization, reading materials, quizzes (with scheduling "waves" and per-student windows), assignments and a gradebook, attendance, discussions, direct messaging, presentations, and AI authoring tools. Privacy is FERPA-first: student education records live behind authentication and are intentionally excluded from public crawling and indexing.

## Product

- [Features](https://fsuac.com/features/): What CourseWise does for teachers, students, and admins.
- [Pricing](https://fsuac.com/pricing/): Plans and pricing.
- [About](https://fsuac.com/about/): What CourseWise is and who it's for.
- [Contact](https://fsuac.com/contact/): How to get in touch.
- [Changelog](https://fsuac.com/changelog/): Recent product updates.

## Comparisons

- [CourseWise vs Canvas](https://fsuac.com/compare/canvas/): AI-native, FERPA-first vs a comprehensive enterprise LMS.
- [CourseWise vs Google Classroom](https://fsuac.com/compare/google-classroom/): A complete teaching platform vs a free Google-Workspace assignment tool.
- [CourseWise vs Moodle](https://fsuac.com/compare/moodle/): Managed AI-native SaaS vs self-hosted open-source.

## Use cases

- [CourseWise for K-12 schools](https://fsuac.com/use-cases/k12/): FERPA- and COPPA-first, fully managed, governed AI.
- [CourseWise for higher education](https://fsuac.com/use-cases/higher-ed/): AI-native assessment + audit for departments.
- [CourseWise for individual educators](https://fsuac.com/use-cases/individual-educators/): Fast AI authoring, BYO API key, no IT.

## Legal & trust

- [Privacy Policy](https://fsuac.com/legal/privacy/)
- [Terms of Service](https://fsuac.com/legal/terms/)

- [Security](https://fsuac.com/legal/security/)
- [Subprocessors](https://fsuac.com/legal/subprocessors/)

- [Data Requests](https://fsuac.com/legal/data-requests/)
- [Data Processing Addendum (DPA)](https://fsuac.com/legal/dpa/)

## Notes

- The authenticated application (dashboards, courses, and all student data) is private and FERPA-protected; it is deliberately not indexed.
- The public site is available in English, French, and Simplified Chinese (language is selected in-app).
